system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_capphat_vattu_nguyenlieu_create","body":"
CREATE   PROC [dbo].[TR_CAPPHAT_VATTU_NGUYENLIEU_CREATE]
(
	@MaDonHang nvarchar(100),
	@MaSP nvarchar(200),
	@LoaiCapPhat nvarchar(50),
	@DinhMuc nvarchar(10),
	@NguoiTao nvarchar(50),
	@NgayTao datetime,
	@NguoiSua nvarchar(50),
	@NgaySua datetime
)
AS
--DECLARE @MaDonHang nvarchar(100) = 'DQH-78'
--DECLARE @MaSP nvarchar(200) = '5317VN_EDC001_EPO'
--DECLARE @LoaiCapPhat nvarchar(50) = 'BEFORE'
--DECLARE @DinhMuc nvarchar(10) = 'NKI'
--DECLARE @NguoiTao nvarchar(50) = 'cuongpv'
--DECLARE @NgayTao datetime = GETDATE()
--DECLARE @NguoiSua nvarchar(50) = 'cuongpv'
--DECLARE @NgaySua datetime = GETDATE()

DECLARE @ID intDECLARE @MaCT nvarchar(200)DECLARE @SoLuong_DinhMuc decimal(18, 5)DECLARE @SoLuong_Can decimal(18, 5)DECLARE @SoLuong_DaNhan decimal(18, 5)DECLARE @SoLuong_ConLai decimal(18, 5)DECLARE @SoLuong_Vuot decimal(18, 5)DECLARE @SoLuong_DaYeuCau decimal(18, 5)DECLARE @Active bit

DECLARE @SOLUONG_DONHANG INT
SELECT @SOLUONG_DONHANG = SUM(order_qty)
FROM tr_order_detail
WHERE order_number = @MaDonHang
	AND f_cancelled = 'N'
	--AND IsRelease = 0
	AND item_number = @MaSP

IF @SOLUONG_DONHANG IS NULL
	SET @SOLUONG_DONHANG = 0

IF @SOLUONG_DONHANG > 0
BEGIN
	DECLARE @TBDINHMUC TABLE
	(
		MaCT nvarchar(200),
		SoLuong_DinhMuc decimal(18, 5)
	)

	IF @DinhMuc = 'NKI'
	BEGIN
		IF @LoaiCapPhat = 'BEFORE'
		BEGIN
			INSERT INTO @TBDINHMUC(MaCT, SoLuong_DinhMuc)
			SELECT mavt, SUM(soluong) 
			FROM tr_dinhmuc_ngukim
			WHERE masp = @MaSP AND HWforWW = 1
			GROUP BY mavt
		END
		ELSE IF @LoaiCapPhat = 'AFTER'
		BEGIN
			INSERT INTO @TBDINHMUC(MaCT, SoLuong_DinhMuc)
			SELECT mavt, SUM(soluong) 
			FROM tr_dinhmuc_ngukim
			WHERE masp = @MaSP AND HWforPacking = 1
			GROUP BY mavt
		END
		ELSE IF @LoaiCapPhat = 'AI'
		BEGIN
			INSERT INTO @TBDINHMUC(MaCT, SoLuong_DinhMuc)
			SELECT mavt, SUM(soluong) 
			FROM tr_dinhmuc_ngukim
			WHERE masp = @MaSP AND HWforAI = 1
			GROUP BY mavt
		END
	END
	ELSE IF @DinhMuc = 'DGO'
	BEGIN
		INSERT INTO @TBDINHMUC(MaCT, SoLuong_DinhMuc)
		SELECT madonggoi, SUM(soluong) FROM tr_dinhmuc_donggoi
		WHERE masp = @MaSP
		GROUP BY madonggoi
	END
	ELSE IF @DinhMuc = 'SON'
	BEGIN
		IF @LoaiCapPhat = 'SONTRONG'
		BEGIN
			INSERT INTO @TBDINHMUC(MaCT, SoLuong_DinhMuc)
			SELECT mact, SUM(sl_sp) FROM tr_dinhmuc_son
			WHERE masp = @MaSP AND sontrongsanpham = 1
			GROUP BY mact
		END
		ELSE IF @LoaiCapPhat = 'SONNGOAI'
		BEGIN
			INSERT INTO @TBDINHMUC(MaCT, SoLuong_DinhMuc)
			SELECT mact, SUM(sl_sp) FROM tr_dinhmuc_son
			WHERE masp = @MaSP AND sontrongsanpham = 0
			GROUP BY mact
		END
	END

BEGIN TRANSACTION
	BEGIN TRY
		UPDATE tr_capphat_vattu_nguyenlieu
		SET Active = 0
		WHERE MaDonHang = @MaDonHang AND MaSP = @MaSP
			AND DinhMuc = @DinhMuc AND LoaiCapPhat = @LoaiCapPhat

		DECLARE CUR CURSOR LOCAL FOR
			SELECT MaCT, SoLuong_DinhMuc 
			FROM @TBDINHMUC
		OPEN CUR
		FETCH NEXT FROM CUR INTO @MaCT, @SoLuong_DinhMuc
		WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0
		BEGIN
			SET @SoLuong_Can = 0;			SET @SoLuong_DaNhan = 0;			SET @SoLuong_ConLai = 0;			SET @SoLuong_Vuot = 0;			SET @SoLuong_DaYeuCau = 0;

			SET @SoLuong_Can = @SoLuong_DinhMuc * @SOLUONG_DONHANG;

			SELECT @ID = ID, 
				@SoLuong_DaNhan = SoLuong_DaNhan,
				@SoLuong_DaYeuCau = SoLuong_DaYeuCau,
				@SoLuong_Vuot = SoLuong_Vuot
			FROM tr_capphat_vattu_nguyenlieu
			WHERE MaDonHang = @MaDonHang AND MaSP = @MaSP AND MaCT = @MaCT
				AND DinhMuc = @DinhMuc AND LoaiCapPhat = @LoaiCapPhat
	
			IF @ID IS NULL
			BEGIN
				-- INSERT
				SET @SoLuong_DaNhan = 0
				SET @SoLuong_ConLai = @SoLuong_Can
				SET @SoLuong_Vuot = 0
				SET @SoLuong_DaYeuCau = 0

				INSERT INTO tr_capphat_vattu_nguyenlieu
				(
					MaDonHang, MaSP, MaCT, 
					SoLuong_DinhMuc, SoLuong_Can, SoLuong_DaNhan, SoLuong_ConLai,
					SoLuong_Vuot, SoLuong_DaYeuCau, LoaiCapPhat, 
					NguoiTao, NgayTao, NguoiSua, NgaySua, Active, DinhMuc
				) VALUES
				(
					@MaDonHang, @MaSP, @MaCT,
					@SoLuong_DinhMuc, @SoLuong_Can, @SoLuong_DaNhan, @SoLuong_ConLai,
					@SoLuong_Vuot, @SoLuong_DaYeuCau, @LoaiCapPhat,
					@NguoiTao, @NgayTao, @NguoiSua, @NgaySua, 1, @DinhMuc
				)
			END
			ELSE
			BEGIN
				-- UPDATE
				SET @SoLuong_ConLai = @SoLuong_Can - @SoLuong_DaNhan
				IF @SoLuong_ConLai < 0
				BEGIN
					SET @SoLuong_Vuot = ABS(@SoLuong_ConLai)
					SET @SoLuong_ConLai = 0
					SET @SoLuong_DaNhan = 0
				END
				UPDATE tr_capphat_vattu_nguyenlieu
				SET SoLuong_DinhMuc = @SoLuong_DinhMuc,
					SoLuong_Can = @SoLuong_Can,
					SoLuong_DaNhan = @SoLuong_DaNhan,
					SoLuong_ConLai = @SoLuong_ConLai,
					SoLuong_Vuot = @SoLuong_Vuot,
					SoLuong_DaYeuCau = @SoLuong_DaYeuCau,
					Active = 1,
					NguoiSua = @NguoiSua,
					NgaySua = @NgaySua
				WHERE ID = @ID
			END
			FETCH NEXT FROM CUR INTO @MaCT, @SoLuong_DinhMuc
		END
		CLOSE CUR
		DEALLOCATE CUR 

		--UPDATE tr_order_detail
		--SET IsRelease = 1
		--WHERE order_number = @MaDonHang AND item_number = @MaSP

		
	END TRY
	BEGIN CATCH
		IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0
			ROLLBACK TRANSACTION
	END CATCH

	IF @@TRANCOUNT > 0
		COMMIT TRANSACTION

END


--SELECT * FROM tr_capphat_vattu_nguyenlieu

","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.cur","dbo.tr_capphat_vattu_nguyenlieu","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_order_detail"],"writesTables":["dbo.tr_capphat_vattu_nguyenlieu"],"flags":["has-transaction","has-try-catch","has-cursor","has-while","has-group-by"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
